title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at PropTiger

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at PropTiger
jsonLd.description:
PropTiger has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
